event: ILLUMINATE trial terminated — excess CV mortality with torcetrapib
impact: Killed torcetrapib; cast doubt on entire CETP inhibitor class

event: Nissen meta-analysis — excess MI and CV death risk with rosiglitazone
impact: Black-box warning, severe prescribing restrictions; effectively withdrew rosiglitazone from most markets

event: BART trial — aprotinin associated with excess renal failure and mortality vs tranexamic acid
impact: Worldwide market withdrawal of aprotinin (Trasylol) in 2007

event: AIM-HIGH — niacin added to statin showed no incremental CV benefit, increased stroke risk
impact: Early termination; guideline downgrade of niacin for CV prevention

event: HPS2-THRIVE — extended-release niacin/laropiprant showed no CV benefit and increased serious adverse events
impact: Final nail for niacin in CV prevention; ESC/ACC guidelines removed routine recommendation

event: dal-OUTCOMES — dalcetrapib showed no CV benefit despite significant HDL-C raising
impact: Programme terminated; reinforced HDL hypothesis failure

event: ACCELERATE — evacetrapib failed to reduce major adverse CV events despite 130% HDL-C increase
impact: Programme terminated; near-total abandonment of CETP inhibitor class (except anacetrapib/obicetrapib)

event: ALTITUDE — aliskiren added to ACEi/ARB increased renal events, hypotension, and hyperkalaemia
impact: Contraindication with ACEi/ARBs in diabetes; major market contraction for aliskiren

event: SCIPIO cardiac stem cell trial retracted — data fabrication in autologous cardiac stem cell therapy
impact: Retraction undermined cardiac regenerative medicine field; CADUCEUS and CONCERT-HF also negative

event: ORBITA — sham-controlled RCT found PCI did not improve exercise time vs placebo in stable angina
impact: Challenged routine PCI for stable angina; re-ignited debate on placebo effect in interventional cardiology

event: ISCHEMIA — PCI/CABG not superior to medical therapy for stable ischaemic heart disease with moderate-severe ischaemia
impact: Paradigm shift: initial invasive strategy no longer default for stable CAD; guideline changes in ACC/AHA 2021

event: RECOVERY — hydroxychloroquine showed no benefit and possible harm in hospitalised COVID-19 patients
impact: WHO SOLIDARITY and RECOVERY both terminated HCQ arms; removed from COVID treatment protocols globally

event: DES superiority over BMS confirmed — bare metal stent displaced by drug-eluting stent as default
impact: BMS use fell from >90% to <20% in most PCI centres by 2010; reserved only for selected high-bleeding-risk patients

event: Second-generation DES displaced first-generation — SPIRIT IV and COMPARE demonstrate superiority
impact: First-gen DES (Cypher, Taxus) withdrawn; second-gen everolimus-eluting stents became standard

event: PAC-Man and ESCAPE trials — pulmonary artery catheter monitoring showed no mortality benefit and potential harm
impact: PA catheter use in heart failure and ICU fell dramatically; ACC/AHA downgraded recommendation

event: SYMPLICITY HTN-3 — catheter-based renal denervation failed to reduce blood pressure vs sham procedure
impact: Medtronic Symplicity programme halted; procedure effectively abandoned pending redesigned trials

event: PCSK9 inhibitors displaced lomitapide and mipomersen as preferred lipid-lowering for HoFH
impact: Lomitapide/mipomersen relegated to ultra-refractory HoFH; commercial viability destroyed

event: RE-LY, ROCKET-AF, ARISTOTLE — DOACs demonstrated superior safety/efficacy profile over warfarin in AF
impact: Warfarin rapidly displaced as first-line anticoagulation in AF; INR monitoring clinics closed globally

event: RELAX-AHF-2 — serelaxin failed to reduce CV death or worsening heart failure at 180 days
impact: FDA rejected serelaxin; programme terminated; acute HF drug development reset

event: ASCEND-HF — nesiritide did not reduce dyspnoea or mortality in acute decompensated heart failure
impact: ACC/AHA removed nesiritide from Class IIa recommendation; prescribing effectively ceased

event: TRUE-AHF — ularitide (natriuretic peptide) failed to reduce CV mortality in acute heart failure
impact: Programme terminated; confirmed pattern of natriuretic peptide failures in acute HF

event: STABILITY — darapladib (Lp-PLA2 inhibitor) failed to reduce major CV events in stable CHD
impact: GlaxoSmithKline terminated darapladib; Lp-PLA2 hypothesis invalidated as therapeutic target

event: VISTA-16 — varespladib (sPLA2 inhibitor) increased risk of MI and death; trial terminated early
impact: Trial stopped for futility and harm; sPLA2 pathway abandoned as CV target

event: Ximelagatran hepatotoxicity — FDA rejected approval citing idiosyncratic liver toxicity
impact: AstraZeneca withdrew ximelagatran globally 2006; delayed DOAC class despite positive efficacy data

event: GPIIb/IIIa inhibitors declining — routine upstream use abandoned with advent of potent P2Y12 inhibitors
impact: GPIIb/IIIa use fell >80%; reserved only for bailout during PCI

event: ABSORB III — bioresorbable vascular scaffold showed higher rates of target lesion failure vs DES at 3 years
impact: Abbott withdrew ABSORB BRS from market 2017; bioresorbable scaffold concept set back a decade

event: IABP-SHOCK II — intra-aortic balloon pump showed no mortality benefit in cardiogenic shock
impact: ESC downgraded IABP from Class I to Class III in cardiogenic shock; use fell substantially

event: SGLT2 inhibitors displaced digoxin — DAPA-HF and EMPEROR-Reduced established new HF standard
impact: Digoxin relegated to symptomatic rate control in AF only; no longer first-line HF therapy

event: LATITUDE-TIMI 60 — losmapimod (p38 MAPK inhibitor) failed to reduce CV events post-ACS
impact: P38 MAPK pathway abandoned as CV anti-inflammatory target

event: ENHANCE — ezetimibe failed to show regression of carotid intima-media thickness despite LDL-C lowering
impact: Ezetimibe use collapsed; later partially rehabilitated by IMPROVE-IT (zombie resurrection)

event: IMPROVE-IT — ezetimibe added to simvastatin reduced cardiovascular events in post-ACS patients
impact: Ezetimibe partially rehabilitated; guidelines re-endorsed as add-on to statin therapy

event: SPYRAL HTN-OFF MED — second-generation renal denervation showed BP reduction; zombie resurrection
impact: Renal denervation partially resurrected with redesigned catheters and sham-controlled design

event: EECP guideline downgrade — ACC/AHA removed Class IIb recommendation for enhanced external counterpulsation
impact: EECP use declined sharply; limited reimbursement; marginalised to refractory angina only

event: TTM trial — targeted temperature management at 33°C vs 36°C showed no difference in post-cardiac arrest outcomes
impact: Therapeutic hypothermia protocol at 33°C abandoned; TTM2 (2021) further confirmed 36°C normothermia equivalent

event: PALLAS — dronedarone increased mortality and stroke in permanent atrial fibrillation
impact: FDA/EMA contraindicated dronedarone in permanent AF and severe HF; major market restriction
